children.heading: Commission
children.label: 1 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park Advisory Commission established by .section 410iii–7 of this title

children.heading: Map
children.label: 2 Map
children.text: The term “Map” means the map entitled “Boundary Map Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park”, numbered CEBE–80,001, and dated September 2002.

children.heading: Park
children.label: 3 Park
children.text: The term “Park” means the Cedar Creek and Belle Grove National Historical Park established under and depicted on the Map.section 410iii–3 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
